km.Clyst Fomison, Devon, England: sowតុន, ដិវ៉ុន, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson是Fomison的兒子，於1320年出生在英國戴文索福頓。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1400年在他的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson是Fomison的儿子，于1320年出生在英国戴文索福頓。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1400年在他的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson was born in 1320, in Sowton, Devon, England as the son of Fomison. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1400, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson est né en 1320, à Sowton, Devon, Angleterre, fils de Fomison. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson wurde 1320 in Sowton, Devon, England, als Sohn von Fomison geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson è nato il nel 1320 nel Sowton, Devon, England come figlio di Fomison. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1400, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.Clyst Fomison, Devon, England: イギリスデボンソウトン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Fornysonは1320年にイギリスデボンソウトンでFomisonの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1400年に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson(은)는 1320년 영국 데폰 소우턴에서 Fomison의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson nasceu em 1320, em Sowton, Devon, Inglaterra filho de Fomison. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1400, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson родился в 1320 г. в местности соутон, девон, Англия. Его отца звали Fomison. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1400 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Fornyson nació en 1320, en Sowton, Devon, Inglaterra como hijo de Fomison. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1400, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.

th.1240–Male: ปี1240–ถึงแก่กรรม
